title: Project Lazuli - ZAMegas Compat Patch
description: A data pack that adds compatibility between Project Lazuli and ZAMegas, as requested by fans. For Cobblemon.
body:
A compatibility pack between [Nava's ZA Megas](https://modrinth.com/datapack/navas-zamega) and [Project Lazuli](https://modrinth.com/datapack/project-lazuli-for-cobblemon-preview-version) for Cobblemon. This generally tweaks the ZA Megas to fit Project Lazuli's rules on Megas, alongside using the edits for Project Lazuli's moves and abilities.

A description of everything changed here will be coming soon such as strategies, but for now here's a link to the spreadsheet.
[https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1sv-Lpd4CVJyZumsfD1sUPm5qr_0qDhn_q7fQgS0I_Js/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1sv-Lpd4CVJyZumsfD1sUPm5qr_0qDhn_q7fQgS0I_Js/edit?usp=sharing)

If something's wrong with the mod version, try the data pack version.

.................................

Edit: So this pack was made with the prediction that Champions wouldn't invent brand new abilities.

Hahahah boy were we wrong.

So expect more updates that make the megas centered around the newly revealed abilities as they're revealed.
